hero.subtitle: An all-in-one platform that brings together job posting, application intake, and candidate management — all in one place, built specifically for companies.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: All the recruitment tools your company needs in one platform

items.jobsPortalDesc: Post your jobs professionally on a dedicated portal for your company, and let applicants reach them with ease.
items.cvCollectionDesc: A centralized system for receiving and organizing all incoming applications with instant filtering and search.
items.candidateMgmtDesc: Track every stage of the hiring process for each candidate — from application all the way to the job offer.
items.reportsDesc: An interactive dashboard that gives you a comprehensive view of hiring performance, applicant sources, and time spent at each stage.
items.interviewsDesc: Organize interview appointments and send automatic reminders to candidates and interviewers.
items.hrSettingsDesc: Customize the system to match your company structure — departments, job levels, team permissions, and internal workflows.

portal.title2: Built Into Your System from Day One
portal.subtitle: No need to build anything from scratch. The portal is ready and fully integrated with the rest of the system — post your first job in minutes.
portal.screenshotLabel: Drag your image here or click to choose
portal.screenshotSub: PNG / JPG — a screenshot from your portal

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything on your mind — answered here

items.q: Will the portal appear under my company's name?
items.a: Yes, the portal is set up under a subdomain or custom domain for your company, fully branded with your logo and colors.
Every CV is automatically added to the system along with the applicant's details, and you get an instant notification. You can export them to Excel or work with them directly from the dashboard.

items.q: Is there a limit on the number of jobs or applications?
items.a: It varies by plan. The basic plan allows a set number, while higher-tier plans offer unlimited jobs and applications.

items.q: Can I add members from my HR team?
items.a: Yes, you can add members with different permission levels — admin, interviewer, or view-only — at no extra cost on most plans.
Yes, there's a 14-day free trial with no credit card required. You can explore all the features and decide afterwards.

cta.title: Ready to Elevate Your Hiring Process?
cta.subtitle: Join the companies already using our platform and start working smarter.
